readiness.title: Models not ready
readiness.chatBlocked: Chat is disabled until the model check succeeds.

sidebar.quickChatTooltip: Fast chat without tools — ideal for simple questions, explanations, and everyday conversation.
sidebar.singleAgentTooltip: One agent with roles, tools, and workspace access — ideal for coding, debugging, and focused development work.
sidebar.multiAgentTooltip: Several agents discuss your request together — ideal for planning, reviews, architecture, and complex decisions.

chat.empty: Select a chat or create a new one.
chat.quickChatDescription: Fast chat without tools — ideal for simple questions.
chat.autoRoleDescription: Detects the topic and switches to the best matching agent automatically.
chat.agentWorkingMulti: Agents are discussing — you can join in at any time.
chat.agentFailed: The agent stopped responding. Please try again.
chat.agentTimeout: The request took too long. Try a smaller model or lower memory.
chat.promptCorrectedHint: Your original message is unchanged. AgentForge adjusted intent keywords and file extensions only.
chat.inputPlaceholderActive: Continue the discussion… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter or Ctrl+Enter for new line)
chat.inputPlaceholder: Enter a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter or Ctrl+Enter for new line)
chat.inputPlaceholderQuick: Ask anything… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter or Ctrl+Enter for new line)
chat.inputPlaceholderMultiActive: Join the discussion… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter or Ctrl+Enter for new line)

shellCommands.title: Console commands
shellCommands.empty: No shell commands have been executed in this chat yet.

settings.title: Settings
settings.cloudProvidersHint: Optional API keys for OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Groq, and Mistral. Use LiteLLM model IDs as default model, e.g. anthropic/claude-3-5-haiku-20241022.
settings.memoryTokensHint: Sets how much context memory each chat may use for persistent remember-tool facts.
settings.memoryPerChatOnly: Memory always applies to the current chat only.

roles.title: Agent roles ({{count}})
roles.hint: Built-in roles are read-only. Create custom roles for specialized agent behavior.
roles.idHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Cannot be changed after creation.
roles.name: Display name
roles.noCustom: No custom roles yet. Create one to extend multi-agent workflows.
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete custom role "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

errors.idFormat: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores (e.g. data_analyst).
errors.idBuiltinConflict: This ID is reserved for a built-in role.
errors.idExists: A role with this ID already exists.

settings.modelAccessHint: Check whether Ollama is reachable and your configured models are available.
settings.testInference: Run short inference test (may take up to 2 minutes)
settings.contextPluginsHint: These plugins load on demand in chat when your input or the AI process requires them.
settings.shellCommandsHint: Control which shell commands agents may run in your workspace.
settings.shellCommandsRuleWhitelist: Allowed commands run automatically and are logged in the chat command history.
settings.shellCommandsRuleBlacklist: Blocked commands are never executed and are logged as blocked.
settings.shellCommandsRuleApproval: All other commands require your approval before execution.
settings.resizeHint: Drag the bottom-right corner to resize this dialog

about.title: About AgentForge
about.lead: Multi-agent AI platform for coding, collaboration, and structured tasks.
about.note: AgentForge supports single-agent coding and multi-agent workflows with configurable memory, roles, and human-in-the-loop approvals.
about.manualHint: See the user manual for setup, daily use, and troubleshooting.

models.title: Model management
models.lead: Add models, assign tasks, and configure routing per task.
models.noModels: No models yet — import from Ollama or add manually.

welcome.title: Welcome to AgentForge
welcome.intro: This setup wizard checks whether Ollama is reachable, models are available, API keys work, and the workspace is configured correctly.
welcome.hint: You can skip at any time and resume later via "Resume setup" in the sidebar.

ollama.title: Ollama server
ollama.intro: Enter the URL of your Ollama server (local or remote/NAS).

models.title: Import models
models.intro: Import installed Ollama models into the AgentForge registry. You can then assign the right model per task.
models.upToDate: No new models — registry is up to date

openai.title: OpenAI API (optional)
openai.intro: Optionally enter an OpenAI API key if you want to use cloud models. Without a key, this step is skipped.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.intro: AgentForge works in this directory. It must exist and be writable.

verify.title: Full verification
verify.intro: All required components are checked, including a short model inference test.

complete.title: Setup complete
complete.intro: AgentForge is configured. You can adjust settings anytime under Settings or Manage models.

errors.requiredFailed: Not all required tests passed. Please check your settings.
